zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Peverell於1223年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Hugh Peverell25歲，母親Isabell de Brymeton21歲。他於1247年之前與wife Hugh Peverell在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1259年在英國可瓦爾博德明享年36歲，埋葬在英國戴文桑普福德 培維勒爾。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Peverell was born in 1223, in Devon, England, his father, Hugh Peverell, was 25 and his mother, Isabell de Brymeton, was 21. He married wife Hugh Peverell before 1247, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1259, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Sampford Peverell, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Peverell est né en 1223, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Peverell, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabell de Brymeton, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé wife Hugh Peverell avant 1247, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1259, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Sampford Peverell, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Peverell 1223 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Peverell 25 und seine Mutter Isabell de Brymeton 21. Er hat vor 1247 in Europa wife Hugh Peverell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1259 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Bodmin, Cornwall, England und wurde in Sampford Peverell, Devon, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Peverellが1223年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Hugh Peverellは25歳，母Isabell de Brymetonは21歳であった。1247年以前にヨーロッパでwife Hugh Peverellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1259年にイギリスコルンワルボドミンで36歳で死去し，イギリスデボンサンプフォード ペバーエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Peverell(이)가 1223년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Peverell(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabell de Brymeton(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1247년 이전 우럽에서 wife Hugh Peverell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1259년 영국 코른월 보드민에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 샘p퍼드 p에버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Peverell nasceu em 1223, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Peverell, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabell de Brymeton, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com wife Hugh Peverell antes 1247, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Peverell родился в 1223 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Peverell было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabell de Brymeton, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени wife Hugh Peverell перед 1247 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1259 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности сэмпфорд пивирэлл, девон, Англия.
